extensionDescription.message: pipixia cross-border e-commerce product collection assistant

notSupportBatchCollectionTips.message: This platform does not support batch collection using the plugin. Please collect from the product details page.

pleaseSetCollectInfo.message: Please set the collection information first.

currMonthCollectNumReachLimit.message: You have reached the maximum number of products you can collect this month. If you need to collect more products, please subscribe to the collection resource package.

addCollectionTaskFailedAndPleaseContactC.message: Failed to add collection task. Please contact customer service.

isClearLinkCache.message: Clear link cache. Are you sure?

accountIsAbnormalPleaseTryAgainFrequentl.message: Account is abnormal. Product collection has failed. Please reduce the collection frequency and try again later or switch to a different Pinduoduo buyer account.

ifAlreadyLoggedInRefreshThePageAndTryAga.message: If you are already logged in, please refresh the page and try again.

goToSourcePlatformCollectProducts.message: You can directly collect products by going to the corresponding source platform. Before you collect, you can $1customize your exclusive collection rules$2

unableToCollectInventoryTips.message: Due to platform restrictions, some products will not be able to collect inventory, do you want to continue?
